series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to grants including, but not limited to, applications, grant agreements, amendments, supporting documentation, exhibits, disbursements, reports, royalty agreements, correspondence, award memos, and other records filed with and related to the grant.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: three (3) years end of post-term reporting, or unfunded/unsuccessful applications two (2) years date of denial Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed. ; Paper: period specified electronic format
